workflow.name: Managed Delegate Loop Workflow
workflow.description: Generic FreshForge-shaped graph for bounded local-worker extraction, self-audit, repair, convergence checking, and paid supervisor delta-review.

nodes.name: Prepare bounded ticket
nodes.description: Supervisor or script selects source inputs, schema, allowed outputs, and iteration policy for a bounded worker loop.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Supervisor defines source scope, schema, and stop rules before local workers run.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: supervisor checkpoint required when paid supervisor authors the ticket

nodes.name: Extract candidates
nodes.description: Local worker produces source-anchored candidate records from the bounded ticket.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local worker may produce candidates only; no tracked mutation or acceptance.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker input/output tokens at zero cash cost

nodes.name: Self-audit candidates
nodes.description: Local worker audits candidates against supplied source excerpts and labels defects.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local self-audit is defect detection only and is not validation.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker input/output tokens at zero cash cost

provenance.implementation: configured Ollama worker model in audit mode

nodes.name: Repair candidates
nodes.description: Local worker repairs candidate records using only self-audit findings and supplied source excerpts.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local worker may repair candidate records but cannot approve or promote them.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local worker input/output tokens at zero cash cost

provenance.implementation: configured Ollama worker model in repair mode

nodes.name: Check convergence
nodes.description: Deterministic policy compares iteration metrics and returns continue, stop, escalate, or abandon.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Script may route the loop but cannot make semantic acceptance claims.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: none unless supervisor interprets the decision

nodes.name: Supervisor delta review
nodes.description: Paid supervisor reviews final candidates, iteration evidence, and economics before accepting, repairing, scaling, or stopping.

outputs.supervisor_decision: accepted, repair_needed, scale, abandon, or complete_directly

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Supervisor owns final acceptance, promotion, economics interpretation, and scale decisions.

artifacts.path_or_reference: tracked sanitized decision packet or planning note
